title: SHERIFF'S OFFICE - 211info
text: BENTON COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services, including public records requests, emergency management, search and rescue operations, dispatch services, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services, including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 180 NW 5th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration and law enforcement services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Animal Control: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 766-6858 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6858 Law enforcement building Benton County Jail (541) 766-6866 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Animal Control Sheriff Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
